name: Vast

overview.value: Vast (also styled Vast Space) is a privately held American aerospace company headquartered in Long Beach, California, founded in 2021 by entrepreneur Jed McCaleb with the goal of developing artificial gravity space stations to expand humanity beyond the solar system.

focus.value: Next-generation space stations and space infrastructure, using an incremental, hardware-rich and low-cost approach

notes: Added in the audit Phase 3 backfill (2026-07-08), verify-then-add.

events.headline: Vast launches publicly with mission to build artificial-gravity space stations
Vast acquires Launcher to accelerate its space station program
Vast announces Haven-1 and Vast-1 missions to be launched by SpaceX
Vast's Haven Demo pathfinder satellite reaches orbit and confirms nominal operations
Vast wins NASA order for sixth private astronaut mission to the ISS
Vast secures $500 million in funding to build out Haven space stations
